task_description: Add SNS notifications for pipeline completion/errors and Step Functions error handling with DynamoDB status updates. Strict TDD approach: write failing CDK assertion tests first, then implement minimal code to pass.

verification.summary: All 24 tests pass (18 existing + 6 new SnsNotificationTest). Build compiles cleanly. Tests verify: 2 SNS topics exist, KMS encryption, sns:Publish in state machine, Catch blocks, FAILED status update with errorInfo, and IAM policy for SNS publish to specific (non-wildcard) resources.
